page_metadata.biotools__summary: SIM finds a user-defined number of best non-intersecting alignments between two protein sequences or within a sequence. Results can be viewed with LALNVIEW, a graphical viewer program for pairwise alignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SIM finds a user-defined number of best non-intersecting alignments between two protein sequences or within a sequence. Results can be viewed with LALNVIEW, a graphical viewer program for pairwise alignments.
